mapper.sql: p.id, p.title, p.description, p.price, p.category_id, p.seller_id, p.status, p.create_time, c.name AS category_name, u.username AS seller_name, (SELECT image_url FROM product_image pi WHERE pi.product_id = p.id ORDER BY pi.id LIMIT 1) AS main_image_url
mapper.select: SELECT FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON p.seller_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON p.seller_id = u.id WHERE p.seller_id = #{sellerId} ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product(title, description, price, category_id, seller_id, status, create_time) VALUES(#{title}, #{description}, #{price}, #{categoryId}, #{sellerId}, #{status}, now())
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: WITH bought_category AS ( SELECT p.category_id, COUNT(*)::int AS buy_count FROM order_info o LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id WHERE o.buyer_id = #{userId} AND o.order_status = 'FINISHED' AND p.category_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY p.category_id ) SELECT p.id, p.title, p.description, p.price, p.category_id, p.seller_id, p.status, p.create_time, c.name AS category_name, seller.username AS seller_name, ( SELECT pi.image_url FROM product_image pi WHERE pi.product_id = p.id ORDER BY pi.id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS main_image_url, CONCAT('你购买过 ', c.name, ' 类商品') AS recommend_reason, bc.buy_count AS recommend_score FROM product p INNER JOIN bought_category bc ON p.category_id = bc.category_id LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user seller ON p.seller_id = seller.id WHERE p.status = 'ON_SALE' AND p.seller_id <> #{userId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM order_info o2 WHERE o2.product_id = p.id AND o2.buyer_id = #{userId} AND o2.order_status IN ('WAIT_CONFIRM', 'TRADING', 'FINISHED') ) ORDER BY bc.buy_count DESC, p.create_time DESC LIMIT #{size}
